string.text: Settlement Manager Enhanced {VERSION}
Enable Mod
Master toggle. When off, no settlement fund or garrison auto actions will occur.
Show Notifications
Display information messages for fund burns, extra build speed, and prison-to-garrison recruits.
War Donation
War Donation Denars per Influence
Controls how many denars are gained for each influence spent through the Start War Donation menu in a town keep. Default: 1,000.
Fund Transfer & Boost
Enable Fund Scaling (2%/4% daily)

On player-owned towns/castles with current construction fund (BoostBuildingProcess) > 0: every day burn an extra 2% (town) / 4% (castle) of the fund as cost and grant additional build speed using 0.1 (town) / 0.05 (castle) efficiency. This layers on top of vanilla flat 500g=50 (town) / 250g=20 (castle) behavior. Large reserves now matter (see transfer limit).
Raise Transfer Limit to 1,000,000 (UI)

Patches the settlement construction fund transfer slider in the settlement management screen. Vanilla hard limit is ~10,000 per transaction; this raises the effective max to 1,000,000 so you can dump serious gold into the reserve for the scaling boost.
Force Fund Scaling Pass Now
Immediately process the % burn + extra build speed for all your owned towns and castles (one-shot). Useful for testing large reserves.
Castle Garrison Recruit
Castle Auto Recruit from Dungeon

Daily for your owned castles: recruit up to the configured number of troop prisoners from the castle dungeon into the garrison roster. Always ignores NPC heroes (IsHero) and skips vanilla obedience/conformity checks.
Daily Castle Dungeon Recruits
Maximum number of prisoners automatically recruited from a castle dungeon into its garrison each daily tick.
Force Castle Garrison Recruit Now
Immediately run prison-to-garrison recruitment for all your owned castles (respects caps and filters).
Construction fund at {SETTLEMENT}: burned {COST} for +{BUILD} build speed.
Recruited {COUNT} prisoners from prison into {SETTLEMENT} garrison.
Forced fund pass affected {N} settlements.
Forced garrison recruit: {COUNT} prisoners.
SettlementManagerEnhanced failed to initialize Harmony. Check logs.
Ask where the next tournaments will be held
Sponsor a tournament here (10,000)
Not enough denars. You need at least {GOLD} denars.
Locate these towns
No known active tournaments to locate.
Marked {COUNT} tournament towns on map.
A sponsored tournament has been added in {TOWN}.
{TOWN} already has an active tournament. Your sponsored tournament has been queued for the next available round.
Your queued sponsored tournament has now started in {TOWN}.
Start a war donation drive
War needs coin as much as steel. Call on your political capital to raise denars for the campaign. Current rate: {SME_WAR_DONATION_RATIO} denars for each influence spent.
Small drive - spend {SME_WAR_DONATION_SMALL_COST} influence for {SME_WAR_DONATION_SMALL_GOLD} denars
Medium drive - spend {SME_WAR_DONATION_MEDIUM_COST} influence for {SME_WAR_DONATION_MEDIUM_GOLD} denars
Large drive - spend {SME_WAR_DONATION_LARGE_COST} influence for {SME_WAR_DONATION_LARGE_GOLD} denars
Not enough influence. You need at least {INFLUENCE} influence.
War donation complete: spent {INFLUENCE} influence and raised {GOLD} denars.
